Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Typical... She always goes out of her way for the dumbest shit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}She's tried this a few times already. I knew this envelope looked familiar.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Think for yourself for once. Don't just go along with what everyone asks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}You gotta learn how to say no.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}This is how they ended up pushing the role of leader on you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}...Mind your own damn business. Why are you all like this...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}But I guess you can't. Explains why you've accepted being leader.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Tch, you're an odd one. And, thanks to you, I got roped in again...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Thanks for goin' through all that trouble.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}What, you got a problem with that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I told you to get going. I already got plans.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Who cares? Quit asking stupid questions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}It doesn't matter. I'll be back by tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}...That's why I rejoined in the first place.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to go back to[n]the dorm without Aragaki.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I was able to give Aragaki the letter[n]without getting intimidated by him. I feel[n]like my {f 4 30 2 1 1 0} has improved...[n]{f 1 1}
